MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2019 Set For Trial On Sep-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Vivian Rodriguez, Jose Ramirez Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses For Deft Linda Britton, Including Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Doc Requests And For Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs Vivian Rodriguez and Jose Ramirez' Motion To Compel Discovery Responses For Deft Linda Britton, Including Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Doc Requests And For Monetary Sanction

Denied. The motion to compel Defendant Linda Britton to serve verified responses is moot, and sanctions for or against either party are denied.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to aaron@minnisandsmallets.com

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Plaintiff Vivian Rodriguez, Jose Ramirez Notice Of Motion To Deem Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiffs Vivian Rodriguez and Jose Ramirez' Motion To Deem Admissions Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions

Denied. The motion to deem facts admitted is moot, and sanctions for or against either party are denied.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to aaron@minnisandsmallets.com

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
